intro: Achillea millefolium essential oil, also known as yarrow oil, is derived from the flowers and leaves of the yarrow plant and has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality. The oil's distinct earthy and herbal scent also makes it a popular choice for use in perfumes, skincare products, and natural remedies.
